product_outcome: Reduce time-to-first-order for new Metria customers from 14 days to 3 days by removing friction in the onboarding and ordering flow.

opportunity.quote: Jag förstår inte hur jag ska beställa, det finns ingen tydlig knapp eller flöde.
opportunity.rationale: Directly blocks the time-to-first-order metric. The ordering friction is the #1 cited pain across all interviews.

evidence_gaps.gap: We only have 4 interview sources — broader survey data would validate frequency.
evidence_gaps.why_relevant: If the pain is rare, the outcome impact shrinks.

picks.title: Guided ordering wizard
picks.description: Step-by-step wizard that walks the customer through their first order with inline validation.
picks.rationale: Directly addresses the confusion in the ordering flow cited by 3 of 4 interviewees.

picks.title: Quick-order template
picks.description: Pre-filled order templates based on the customer's property type.
picks.rationale: Reduces cognitive load for repeat customers and new ones who match common patterns.

picks.title: Order status dashboard
picks.description: Real-time dashboard showing order progress, replacing email-based status updates.
picks.rationale: Removes the follow-up friction that extends the perceived time-to-first-order.

riskiest.text: Customers will complete a multi-step wizard without abandoning.
riskiest.rationale: Importance=high (wizard is the core solution); evidence=weak (no prototype tested yet).

riskiest.text: Property-type templates cover 80% of first orders.
riskiest.rationale: Importance=high (template coverage drives adoption); evidence=weak (only 4 interviews, limited order data).

test_cards.hypothesis: We believe that customers can complete the ordering wizard in under 5 minutes without assistance.
test_cards.success_criteria: We are right if 4 of 5 participants complete the wizard in under 5 minutes.

test_cards.hypothesis: We believe that property-type templates match 80% of historical first orders.
test_cards.metric: Template match rate against order history
test_cards.success_criteria: We are right if template match rate exceeds 75% across 100 sampled orders.
